title: pteris quadriaurita var. subindivisa
intro: Pteris quadriaurita var. subindivisa, also known as Bracken fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteridaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bracken fern include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
